summary: Coach-specific views and persona switcher for Program Intelligence tested successfully. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend persona switcher works correctly with Program View, Martinez, and Rivera buttons switching between director and coach modes.
critical_code_review_comments: program_engine.py: Clean implementation of coach filtering via athlete_ids from intervention ownership
get_coaches() correctly extracts unique coach names from ALL_INTERVENTIONS, filtering out non-person roles
compute_support_load() correctly filters by_owner to single entry for coach view
Director trends use historical comparison (improving/declining/stable), coach trends show current values only
Coach view correctly sets imbalance_detected=false (director-only concern)
Frontend persona switcher uses data-testid attributes for reliable testing
Title correctly changes between 'Program Intelligence' and 'My View — Coach {name}'
seed_data_creation: None - uses existing mock data with coach ownership from decision_engine.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach-specific views feature complete. Coach Martinez owns ~8 athletes, Coach Rivera owns ~4. Coaches derived from intervention 'owner' field in decision_engine.py. Persona switcher buttons: view-program, view-coach-coach-martinez, view-coach-coach-rivera. Coach trends show direction='current' with delta=0. Director trends show improving/declining/stable with historical deltas.

coaches_list_tests: Each coach has id, name, athlete_count
filtering_tests: Coach health data filtered (fewer athletes than director)
Director and coach trends have proper structure
Event effectiveness filtered for coach's athletes

persona_switcher: Program View button shows director mode
Martinez button switches to coach view with 'My View — Coach Martinez' title
Rivera button switches to coach view with filtered data
Program View button returns to director mode

verified_coach_features: GET /api/program/coaches returns Coach Martinez and Coach Rivera
GET /api/program/intelligence returns director view (25 athletes, all data)
GET /api/program/intelligence?coach_id=Coach%20Martinez returns filtered coach view (~8 athletes)
GET /api/program/intelligence?coach_id=Coach%20Rivera returns filtered coach view (~4 athletes)
Coach view: support_load.by_owner has 1 entry (coach's own bar)
Coach view: trends have direction='current' and delta=0
Director view: trends have direction=improving/declining/stable with deltas
Frontend persona switcher toggles between Program View and coach views
Frontend title changes to 'My View — {coach}' in coach mode
